utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。我想今晚搵套戲睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想去戲院睇定係租嚟睇呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想去戲院睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想喺邊度睇戲呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我係指加州嘅戴維斯。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 咁你今日想搵咩類型嘅電影呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我搵緊啲有湯姆哈迪嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 湯姆哈迪，好呀，其實湯姆哈迪嘅戲最近都好受歡迎㗎。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽落唔錯喎。可唔可以幫我安排吓呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 喺爛番茄度有100分入面嘅91分呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想幾點睇套戲呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 今晚七點，唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，冇問題。今晚七點喺萬利戲院嘅史提戲院有場次呀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽落好完美呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好多謝你幫忙。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，我想今晚喺屋企搵套戲睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好！

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇一套最近出咗藍光碟嘅科幻片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可唔可以講多啲關於套戲嘅資料呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有冇指定嘅男演員或者女演員呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 請等等，一陣就得。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可唔可以建議一套已經出咗藍光碟嘅戲呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 《異形：聖約》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 喺葫蘆加有冇得睇呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係呀，葫蘆加有得睇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好，我就揀呢套。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想唔想睇預告片呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 搞掂晒喇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，可唔可以幫我搵套戲喺屋企睇呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。你可唔可以講多啲關於套戲嘅資料呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，我諗緊啲歷史片，但係要有啲正面訊息，唔好太令人沮喪嗰啲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你打算用邊個電影服務嚟睇呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想喺艾斯芬尼迪度睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你有冇指定嘅女演員或者男演員呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好似丹素華盛頓、羅素高爾或者羅拔唐尼呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，我可唔可以建議一套戲呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，咁就太好喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 《大創業家》呢套戲點睇呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。可唔可以睇吓佢嘅預告片呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 可以呀。等一陣就得。呢度係電影《大創業家》嘅預告片。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 睇落好正呀。好多謝你嘅建議。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我今晚想去睇戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，等我幫你搵吓今晚有咩戲睇。你今日想睇咩類型嘅戲呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇動作片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你嗰區受歡迎嘅動作片包括《美國製造》、《皇家特工：金圈子》同《小時刻》。我可以點幫你揀其中一套呢？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 邊個導演拍《皇家特工：金圈子》㗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔好意思，呢個我暫時幫唔到你。你可以問吓片長、劇情或者場次。或者你直接揀其中一套戲都得。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 嗰啲戲有冇邊套係短過三個鐘㗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 《美國製造》片長係一個鐘五十五分鐘。《皇家特工：金圈子》係兩個鐘二十一分鐘，而《小時刻》就係一個鐘四十二分鐘。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 《皇家特工》最新嗰套係邊套呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔好意思，呢個我暫時幫唔到你。你可以問吓評分、片長或者場次。或者你直接揀其中一套戲都得。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 《皇家特工》嘅評分係幾多呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 喺爛番茄上面，《皇家特工：金圈子》有百分之五十嘅評分。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想揀《皇家特工》嗰套，唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。我已經將呢個場次嘅詳情同埋買飛嘅方法傳咗去你電話度喇。祝你睇戲愉快。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 太好喇。好多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 喂，我想搵套評論家好鍾意嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可唔可以講多啲關於你想睇嘅戲嘅資料呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，除咗最新嗰啲之外，因為我今晚想喺屋企睇戲。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 譬如我啱啱睇咗套新戲。我唔記得個名喇，但係講佢縮細咗咁嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想用邊個電影服務嚟睇呢套戲呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Google Play。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦，你可唔可以就咁俾啲建議我呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 請等一陣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 咁《盜火線》或者《無間道風雲》點睇呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇嗰套戲。多謝你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 嗰個係咪套戲個名嚟㗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 套戲叫做《無間道風雲》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽落都幾好喎。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，我想搵套啱小朋友睇嘅戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可以幫到你。你想睇咩類型嘅戲呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇奇幻片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，等我幫你搵吓。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到幾個選擇俾你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 第一套係《魔雪奇緣》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 第二套係《魔幻森林》。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 第三套係《吹夢的巨人》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我可唔可以喺Redbox租《魔雪奇緣》呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我幫你查吓。等我一陣。係呀，可以喺Redbox租到。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他嘢想問呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇喇。就係咁多。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，唔使客氣。再見，下次再幫你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。我想搵套戲去戲院睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵一套動作冒險片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，太好喇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想問《亞瑟王》仲有冇得上畫㗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 《亞瑟王》淨係喺指定戲院上映咋。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇吓佢嘅劇情簡介。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 冇問題，呢度係《亞瑟王》嘅劇情簡介。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 亞瑟嘅父親被謀殺後，佢嗰個權力慾極強嘅叔叔沃帝根就奪走咗王位。亞瑟被剝奪咗繼承權，喺城市嘅後巷艱難咁長大，唔知道自己真正嘅身份。當命運引導佢將石中劍拔出嚟嘅時候，亞瑟就接受咗佢真正嘅命運，成為一個傳奇嘅戰士同領袖。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。多謝你提供嘅劇情簡介。聽落都幾好睇喎。咁，呢套戲會唔會喺華盛頓特區附近上映㗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 睇嚟，佢喺華盛頓特區附近有得上畫。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。我諗我應該搵到戲院喇。咁今日我想搵嘅嘢都差唔多搞掂晒喇，多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，冇問題。提一提你，今晚淨係得返兩場咋，除此之外，祝你夜晚愉快。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好。多謝你提醒我。我會去睇吓套戲嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 喂，我呢個週末想同啲朋友去睇動作片，我喺加州嘅帕薩迪納，玫瑰碗附近。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，我可以幫你。等我幫你搵吓你嗰區有咩動作片。等一陣。你嗰區嘅動作片有《盜墓迷城》、《神奇女俠》、《加勒比海盜》、《異形》同《銀河守護隊》。呢啲戲有冇邊套啱你同你朋友心水呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，但係邊套最受歡迎呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 兩套最受歡迎嘅戲係《銀河守護隊》同《神奇女俠》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好，我要《神奇女俠》。我可唔可以買四張聽晚嘅飛呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想睇3D定2D呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 3D場次有下晝四點二十分、傍晚六點四十五分同夜晚十點。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想揀傍晚六點四十五分嗰場。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我已經幫你訂咗聽晚傍晚六點四十五分嘅飛喇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 多謝。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想問你可唔可以幫我搵套戲今晚喺屋企睇呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。你想睇咩戲呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁有冇啲比較新上映嘅，可能係政治驚悚片？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我睇到網上經常提到嘅電影有《採訪》、《塞爾瑪》同其他。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 政治片方面，有《採訪》、《塞爾瑪》同《第四公民》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦，你可唔可以講多啲關於《第四公民》呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係《第四公民》嘅資料。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 喺Laura Poitras收到一啲加密電郵之後，發件人聲稱掌握政府大規模秘密監控計劃嘅資料，佢同記者Glenn Greenwald就飛去香港同發件人見面，結果發現嗰個人就係Edward Snowden。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽落好正喎。我可唔可以買嚟睇呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係呀，當然可以啦。你俾2.99美元就得喇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好，咁我就要呢個喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，完美。你想睇高清定係標準畫質呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 高清。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，搞掂晒喇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 多謝。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵一套適合小朋友睇嘅電影。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。仲有冇其他偏好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我要喺Xfinity上面有得睇嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好。Xfinity上面嘅兒童電影。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等一陣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: Jeffrey Wright、Frances McDormand、Maleah Nipay-Padilla (2015)。喺一個友善嘅尼安德特人男孩 (Jack Bright) 嘅幫助下，一隻年輕嘅恐龍 (Raymond Ochoa) 展開咗一場史詩式嘅冒險，為咗同佢摯愛嘅家人 (Jeffrey Wright、Frances McDormand) 團聚。詳情。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。咁我對嗰套有興趣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。仲有冇其他嘢需要幫手呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 咁下次再傾啦。拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可以幫你搵戲㗎。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我需要幫你搵戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，等我睇吓搵到啲咩。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等一陣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 呢度係我幫你搵到嘅電影清單：盧根、死侍、殺神John Wick 2、思裂同埋訪·嚇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我幫你查吓。等等。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 係呀，睇嚟所有推薦嘅電影都喺Redbox有得睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我會揀盧根。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 等我查吓。等一陣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可以租盧根，DVD版係1.50美元，藍光版係2美元。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你睇戲愉快！

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 咁下次再傾啦。拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢啲戲喺Redbox有得睇㗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 太好喇，好多謝你呀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 佢哋有冇邊套喺Redbox有得睇㗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。你知唔知盧根要幾錢呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好呀，我想搵套戲同我老公一齊去睇。你可唔可以幫我呀？我對喜劇有興趣。我哋需要啲可以令我哋笑嘅戲。嗰啲，你知啦，一個半到兩個鐘頭長嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒，遲啲見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，等一陣，我有《野蠻遊戲：叢林遊戲》、《黑豹》同埋《比得兔》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，我可唔可以睇吓《比得兔》嘅預告片呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 當然可以。《比得兔》— 官方預告片。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 呢套好似幾好睇喎。我覺得我會去睇呢套。佢睇落真係好有趣。好多謝你今日嘅幫忙呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 遲啲見。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵套戲今晚喺屋企睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 當然。你心目中有冇啲咩類型呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想睇冒險片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 明白。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我有《奪寶奇兵》、《侏羅紀公園》同埋《阿凡達》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我會揀《侏羅紀公園》。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 明白。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他嘢需要呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁多就夠喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，我想搵套好戲今晚睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 當然，我可以幫你搵。你今日想睇啲咩類型嘅戲呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 驚悚片。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 而家最受歡迎嘅驚悚片係《靈異偵緝檔案》、《地獄》同埋《路易的第九條命》。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: Inferno聽落好正。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 想唔想我講多啲俾你聽呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 想呀。唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 湯漢斯再次飾演哈佛符號學家羅拔·蘭登嘅角色，呢套戲係由導演朗·侯活同編劇大衛·高柏改編自作家丹·布朗嘅暢銷小說《地獄》。戲中講述蘭登利用但丁嘅《神曲》作為工具，去阻止一場毀滅性嘅全球瘟疫。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 嘩。好啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想租DVD定係串流睇套戲呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我租嚟睇啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可以喺Google Play、Amazon、Rotten Tomatoes、Hulu或者FandangoNOW串流睇套戲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你可以喺Netflix、Redbox或者你附近嘅DVD租賃店租套戲。你想唔想我幫你搵吓邊度有呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。係呀，我會喺Netflix租嚟睇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好啦。睇得開心啲啦。拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒。
